title: oxytropis dinarica subsp. velebitica
intro: Oxytropis dinarica subsp. velebitica is a rare species of flowering plant in the pea family, known as a legume, that is native to the Velebit Mountains in Croatia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic and to help alleviate urinary tract infections. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation and aiding in the treatment of various kidney and urinary issues. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
